title: D2L (Desire2Learn / Canvas at OSU)
html:
Stub. OSU's Brightspace/D2L LMS — surfaces in the vault as the quiz/homework chrome in calc and CS-security screenshots throughout spring 2025 (May 2 / 11 / 13 / 14 / 16 / 22). The "20/1 pt 5²·²² Details" ribbon is the signature.
